Package phases

package phases
  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    GameOverPhase
    Represents the game over phase in the game.
    GamePhase
    This class represents the abstract base class for different gamePhases.
    JumpingPhase
    This class represents the jumping phase of the game where players can jump to unoccupied nodes.
    MovingPhase
    This class represents the moving phase of the game, where players can move their stones to neighbours nodes on the board.
    SettingPhase
    This class represents the setting phase of the game where players can place stones to unoccupied nodes.
